column1: #Text=The Eurasian chaffinch, common chaffinch, or simply the chaffinch is a common and widespread small passerine bird in the finch family.
#Text=The male is brightly coloured with a blue-grey cap and rust-red underparts.
#Text=The female is more subdued in colouring, but both sexes have two contrasting white wing bars and white sides to the tail.
#Text=The male bird has a strong voice and sings from exposed perches to attract a mate.
